audit_items.proof_trace: Both code paths correctly produce 1e18 prices: Data Streams prices are normalized to 18 decimals during `transmit()` (L168-172) before storage, so `priceInfo.usdPrice` is always 1e18 when read in `_getAssetPrice`. The Data Feed fallback (L394-400) scales `answer` inline using `feedInfo.usdDataFeed.decimals()` queried live, applying the same scale-up/scale-down logic. No code path returns an unscaled price.
